message:
Running command: # DRT iter 2: 40% complete, 79650 violations. Slow but steady.
# Pre-PnR STA shows WNS = -51.4 ns (very large). This is the pre-synthesis STA
# before any optimization. The actual timing post-CTS-repair is -2 ns.

# The DRT is actively running. This will take many more hours.
# The correct approach now: leave DRT running and provide interim report.

# Set up a sustained background monitoring script and provide interim status.

cat > /tmp/sustained_drt_monitor.sh << 'BGEOF'
#!/bin/bash
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
LOG="/tmp/librelane_final.log"
LR_PID=824793
OUT="/tmp/sustained_drt.log"
echo "Monitor start: $(date)" > "$OUT"
while kill -0 $LR_PID 2>/dev/null; do
  sleep 600
  ELAPSED=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o etime --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  DRT=$(grep "Completing\|Start [0-9]*th\|Total wire.*um\|0 DRC" "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | tail -1 | xargs | head -c 80)
  FGDS=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/"*.gds 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] alive($ELAPSED) $DRT" >> "$OUT"
  [ -n "$FGDS" ] && echo "FINAL_GDS=$FGDS" >> "$OUT" && break
done
echo "DONE: $(date)" >> "$OUT"
tail -30 "$LOG" >> "$OUT"
BGEOF
chmod +x /tmp/sustained_drt_monitor.sh
nohup /tmp/sustained_drt_monitor.sh > /dev/null 2>&1 &
echo "Sustained monitor PID=$!, log=/tmp/sustained_drt.log"

echo ""
echo "=== DRT is running and will complete autonomously ==="
echo "LibreLane PID: 824793"
echo "DRT iteration 2 in progress, ~80K violations remaining"
echo "Expected completion: 10-25 more hours"
echo "When DRT completes, LibreLane will generate final GDS/LEF/LIB"
